steps.title: Set up the interval
steps.content: The estimate is $8.5\%$ and the margin of error is $2.73\%$. A plausible interval extends one margin of error below and above the estimate.

steps.title: Calculate the bounds
steps.content: Lower bound: $$8.5-2.73=5.77.$$ Upper bound: $$8.5+2.73=11.23.$$ So the plausible range is from $5.77\%$ to $11.23\%$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct answer states that it is plausible that between $5.77\%$ and $11.23\%$ of the items are defective, so B is correct.
